Name: Data Extraction Using Azure Content Understanding

Labs.Title: Lab 01 - Environment Setup and Architecture Overview
Labs.Description: Verify lab prerequisites, clone the repository, explore project structure, review the three-workflow architecture, and understand Azure Content Understanding concepts.

Labs.Title: Lab 02 - Deploying Azure Infrastructure with Terraform
Labs.Description: Authenticate with Azure CLI, configure Terraform variables, deploy the complete Azure infrastructure, and verify all resources in the Azure Portal.

Labs.Title: Lab 03 - Configuring the Application
Labs.Description: Configure Azure Functions local settings, update app_config.yaml with Azure endpoints, install dependencies, start the Function App, and verify health checks.

Labs.Title: Lab 04 - Document Extraction Configuration and Ingestion
Labs.Description: Upload extraction configurations, create CU analyzers, ingest a sample lease agreement, and explore extracted fields with bounding boxes and confidence scores.

Labs.Title: Lab 05 - Querying Documents and Deploying to Azure
Labs.Description: Query documents with natural language, explore citations and chat history, deploy to Azure, and monitor with Application Insights.

Software: Visual Studio Code with Python, Azure Functions, and REST Client extensions
AzureServices: Azure Cosmos DB (Mongo API + SQL API)
